Assembly: The assembly ilAgrSela1.hap1.1 is based on 41x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by Project Psyche (https://www.projectpsyche.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Chromosome Z and W were identified by copy number in the diploid assembly.

Assembly: The assembly ihAphMosc1.hap1.1 is based on 32x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Ancient Environmental Genomics Initiative for Sustainability (AEGIS,~https://globe.ku.dk/research/ancient-environmental-genomics-initiative-for-sustainability). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using OATK. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. The X chromosome was identified by read coverage and chromosome number in the diploid assembly. Closely related species have been described as X0 genotypes for male individuals.

Assembly: The assembly ilPhyViri1.hap1.1 is based on 240x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Z chromosome identified based BUSCO gene painting with ancestral Merian elements (https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-024-02329-4).
